# Feature Ledger Entry Template

Use this when a feature-facing change modifies gameplay, UI, art, data, or player-visible flow.

| Feature | Status | Source | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Feature name | Planned/In progress/Done | `path/to/source` | One sentence on player impact and any vision constraints. |

Also update `docs/product/game-vision.md` if the feature changes the creative pillars, survival promise, setting, tone, or art direction.
